title: Ceiling Grids Sound Acoustic Dampeners
brand_hint: Brand unknown — search title to identify manufacturer

specs.product_line: EchoDeco® Grid Baffles / On-The-Grid™ Magnetic Baffles
specs.dimensions: EchoDeco® Grid Baffles: 4', 8', 12', 20', 24', 28' run lengths available; On-The-Grid™ Magnetic Baffles: 24"W or 48"W, multiple panel heights; material thickness 3/8" (9mm) or 3/4" (18mm)
specs.materials: EchoScape™ polyester acoustic material — made from 60% post-consumer recycled PET water bottles; lightweight, high impact resistant, VOC-free, AZO dye free, tackable, 100% recyclable; ASTM E84 Class A fire rated
key_features: Designed for ACT (Acoustical Ceiling Tile) suspended grid ceilings
Compatible with standard 9/16" and 15/16" T-grid ceiling systems
Compatible with 2'x2' and 2'x4' ACT grid layouts
On-The-Grid™ variant features tool-free magnetic installation (pre-installed magnets)
EchoDeco® Grid Baffle variant uses ACT mount clips
Multiple run lengths and panel height options
Can be used as acoustic clouds or connected wall-to-wall
specs.notes: BBI lists three distinct 'Ceiling Grids Sound Acoustic Dampeners' products priced at $271 (ORB variant), $608, and $615 respectively. The $608 product (hero rank #93) is most likely a MergeWorks EchoDeco® Grid Baffle or On-The-Grid™ Magnetic Baffle configuration — both are ACT ceiling grid acoustic products by MergeWorks. No direct SKU/model code was found on the BBI product page. Confidence is medium as manufacturer and product line are identified via authorized dealers and manufacturer site, but exact BBI SKU mapping and warranty terms were not confirmed. No BIFMA or GREENGUARD certifications found for this product line.
